title: LloydsDirect (Echo) - Online Pharmacy Prescription Delivery
problem: Getting repeat prescriptions is inconvenient. Patients must visit pharmacies in person, wait in queues, and manage medication timing.
solution: Online pharmacy platform for NHS repeat prescriptions. Patients order via app, prescriptions are approved electronically, medication is delivered to door.
technology: E-prescription integration, pharmacy logistics, mobile app
target_customer: Patients on repeat medication, NHS patients
regulatory_notes: Licensed pharmacy, GPhC regulated, NHS pharmacy contractor.
varden_fit: Moderate — pharmacy integration could complement Varden's clinic marketplace. Not core to Varden's value proposition but potential partnership.
notes: Originally Echo, acquired by LloydsPharmacy. Model could be replicated in Sweden with online pharmacies.
